name: nexusqueue
description: NexusQueue — a distributed task queue engine (BullMQ/Celery-style) built on Redis + Postgres.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @nexusqueue/shared && npm run build --workspace @nexusqueue/server && npm run build --workspace @nexusqueue/worker && npm run build --workspace @nexusqueue/dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @nexusqueue/shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
